translations.en: Today I'm going to the butcher.
translations.fr: Aujourd'hui, je vais chez le boucher.
translations.ru: Сегодня я иду в мясную лавку.
translations.vi: Hôm nay tôi đi đến tiệm thịt.
translations.nl: Vandaag ga ik naar de slager.
translations.hi: आज मैं मीट की दुकान पर जा रहा हूँ.
translations.nb: I dag går jeg til slakteren.
translations.id: Hari ini aku pergi ke toko daging.
translations.sv: I dag går jag till slaktaren.
translations.da: I dag går jeg til slagteren.
translations.ja: 今日は肉屋に行きます。

tokens.explanation: Temporal adverb indicating time; modifies the verb phrase.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; agrees with the subject ‘ich’.
Personal pronoun, nominative singular, 1st person; subject of the clause.
Preposition ‘zu’ contracted with the article ‘dem’; governs dative and marks direction/goal.
Common noun, masculine; here dative singular as object of ‘zu(m)’ indicating destination/place/person.

sentences.target: Der Metzger schneidet das Fleisch dünn.

translations.de: Der Metzger schneidet das Fleisch dünn.
translations.en: The butcher cuts the meat thin.
translations.es: El carnicero corta la carne bien fina.
translations.fr: Le boucher coupe la viande très finement.
translations.it: Il macellaio taglia la carne sottile.
translations.zh-Hans: 肉铺师傅把肉切得很薄。
translations.yue: 肉檔老闆將啲肉切得好薄。
translations.pt: O açougueiro corta a carne bem fina.
translations.vi: Người bán thịt cắt thịt rất mỏng.
translations.nl: De slager snijdt het vlees dun.
translations.hu: A hentes vékonyra vágja a húst.
translations.hi: कसाई मांस को पतला काटता है.
translations.el: Ο κρεοπώλης κόβει το κρέας σε λεπτές φέτες.
translations.ro: Măcelarul taie carnea în felii subțiri.
translations.cs: Řezník krájí maso na tenké plátky.
translations.ja: 肉屋が肉を薄く切ります。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative masculine singular; determiner of the subject noun.
Common noun, masculine; functions as the subject.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular.
Definite article, accusative neuter singular; determiner of the object noun.
Common noun, neuter; direct object of the verb.
Adjective used predicatively/resultatively with the object (‘Fleisch’) indicating the resulting state/degree of thickness.

sentences.target: Wir warten beim Metzger auf unsere Nummer.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ ˈvaʁtən baɪ̯m ˈmɛt͡sɡɐ aʊ̯f ˈʊnzəʁə ˈnʊmɐ/

translations.de: Wir warten beim Metzger auf unsere Nummer.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ ˈvaʁtən baɪ̯m ˈmɛt͡sɡɐ aʊ̯f ˈʊnzəʁə ˈnʊmɐ/
translations.en: We're waiting at the butcher's for our number.
translations.es: Estamos esperando nuestro número en la carnicería.
translations.fr: Nous attendons notre numéro chez le boucher.
translations.it: Aspettiamo il nostro numero in macelleria.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在肉铺等我们的号码。
translations.yue: 我哋喺肉檔等我哋嘅籌號。
translations.ru: Мы ждём свой номер в мясной лавке.
translations.pt: Estamos esperando nosso número no açougue.
translations.he: אנחנו מחכים למספר שלנו אצל הקצב.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang đợi số của mình ở tiệm thịt.
translations.nl: We wachten bij de slager op ons nummer.
translations.uk: Ми чекаємо свій номер у м’ясника.
translations.hi: हम मीट की दुकान पर अपने नंबर का इंतज़ार कर रहे हैं.
translations.pl: Czekamy na nasz numer u rzeźnika.
translations.el: Περιμένουμε τον αριθμό μας στο κρεοπωλείο.
translations.nb: Vi venter på nummeret vårt hos slakteren.
translations.id: Kami menunggu nomor kami di toko daging.
translations.sv: Vi väntar på vårt nummer hos slaktaren.
translations.cs: U řezníka čekáme na své číslo.
translations.da: Vi venter på vores nummer hos slagteren.
translations.ja: 肉屋で自分の番号を待っています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, nominative plural, 1st person; subject.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 1st person plural; selects a prepositional complement with ‘auf’.
Preposition ‘bei’ contracted with ‘dem’; governs dative; marks location.
Common noun, masculine; dative singular as complement of ‘bei(m)’ indicating location.
Preposition used with the verb ‘warten’ (‘warten auf’); governs accusative to mark the object of waiting.
Possessive determiner, accusative feminine singular; agrees with ‘Nummer’.
Common noun, feminine; accusative singular as object of the preposition ‘auf’.

sentences.target: Meine Oma kennt den Metzger seit Jahren.
sentences.reading: /ˈmaɪ̯nə ˈoːma kɛnt deːn ˈmɛt͡sɡɐ zaɪ̯t ˈjaːʁən/

translations.de: Meine Oma kennt den Metzger seit Jahren.
translations.ipa: /ˈmaɪ̯nə ˈoːma kɛnt deːn ˈmɛt͡sɡɐ zaɪ̯t ˈjaːʁən/
translations.en: My grandma has known the butcher for years.
translations.es: Mi abuela conoce al carnicero desde hace años.
translations.fr: Ma grand-mère connaît le boucher depuis des années.
translations.it: Mia nonna conosce il macellaio da anni.
translations.ko: 우리 할머니는 정육점 주인을 오랫동안 알고 지냈어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我奶奶认识肉铺的师傅很多年了。
translations.yue: 我阿嫲識嗰位肉檔老闆好多年。
translations.ru: Моя бабушка знает мясника много лет.
translations.pt: Minha avó conhece o açougueiro há anos.
translations.he: סבתא שלי מכירה את הקצב כבר שנים.
translations.vi: Bà tôi biết người bán thịt đó từ nhiều năm nay.
translations.nl: Mijn oma kent de slager al jaren.
translations.uk: Моя бабуся знає м’ясника багато років.
translations.hu: A nagymamám évek óta ismeri a hentest.
translations.hi: मेरी दादी कसाई को कई सालों से जानती हैं.
translations.pl: Moja babcia zna rzeźnika od lat.
translations.el: Η γιαγιά μου γνωρίζει τον κρεοπώλη εδώ και χρόνια.
translations.nb: Bestemoren min har kjent slakteren i mange år.
translations.id: Nenekku sudah kenal tukang daging itu selama bertahun-tahun.
translations.sv: Min mormor har känt slaktaren i många år.
translations.ro: Bunica mea îl cunoaște pe măcelar de ani de zile.
translations.cs: Moje babička zná řezníka už léta.
translations.da: Min mormor har kendt slagteren i mange år.
translations.fi: Isoäitini on tuntenut lihakauppiaan jo vuosia.
translations.ja: 祖母は肉屋の主人を長年知っています。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, nominative feminine singular; agrees with the subject noun ‘Oma’.
